reviews: Out on a bingeing spree to mark the start to this Deepavali long weekend! This petite bowl of laksa at $2.80 is perfect for me with just a mild level of spiciness since I’ve got a low tolerance towards spicy food; and the small portion is great if you are feeling not that hungry but still feel like eating something, before dinner time.
Hardly we can find a $2.50 bowl of Laksa nowadays. 63 Laksa broth doesn't has a rich coconut flavour but more with the dry shrimp taste which is quite flavourful and easy to drink

The laksa ($2.50) is served in a traditional looking porcelain bowl together with a porcelain spoon. Although not a very big bowl, it is filled to the brim with shortened thick bee hoon, uniformly sliced fish cake, bean sprouts and cockles.

other_info.address: 20 Ghim Moh Road #01-20 Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre Singapore 270020

reviews: Butterfly Fritter @ Delisnacks 德利食, 20 Ghim Moh Road, Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre #01-23. Experienced some fried butterfly fritter for breakfast. Nice crisp and sweet but found it quite oily as well.

other_info.address: 20 Ghim Moh Road #01-23 Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre Singapore 270020

reviews: Freshly made appam available in original, egg or cheese, paired with red jaggery sugar and freshly grated coconut.
Previously known as Heaven's Indian Curry, this stall specialises in 2 items: Appam and Putu Mayam. The Appam is made on the spot.
Princess Appam (S$3) Cooked with egg and butter, topped with cheese, eat with sugar or orange sugar.

other_info.address: 20 Ghim Moh Road #01-26 Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre Singapore 270020

reviews: Long Queue Mee Siam @ $4/5. This is Chinese mee siam, not as tangy & sour. But taste very good.
Satay Beehoon. Everyone queue for their mee siam but their satay beehoon is not bad too.
Decent bowl of Mee Siam ($3.00) The uncle thoughtfully helps to cut the bee hoon for easier consumption.
Durians!!! Durians!!!! My turn to have durians! Since my hubby din buy for me. I get it myself!!!
D13 for dessert after lunch on Boxing Day. #durian

other_info.address: 20 Ghim Moh Road #01-125 Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre Singapore 270020

reviews: Decent Left: Pan Fried Salmon with Veggies in Pink Sauce Right: Salmon Donburi (Both $7.50 nett each)
Salmon donburi SGD 7.50 This is nice
dishes: Pan Fried Salmon with Veggies in Pink Sauce

stall_name: Sheng Ji Shao La 昇记烧腊 (Ghim Moh Market)
reviews: Roasted Pork @ Sheng Ji Shao La 昇记烧腊 | 20 Ghim Moh Road | Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre #01-69. I noticed a relatively long queue for this roasted delight stall and decided to join the queue as well. I opted for the roasted pork meat only as I was not feeling that hungry. However, after taking a bite of the crackling and savory skin, it was simply irresistible that I can easily finish a whole bowl of white rice with this roasted meat.

other_info.address: 20 Ghim Moh Road #01-69 Ghim Moh Market Singapore 270020

reviews: Ice Kachang @ Golden Swallow Dessert, Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre #01-53. Plagued by a nasty cough...
Ice Kachang with Dad My grandparents used to stay in the Ghim Moh neighbourhood. This was where all the family gathered.

other_info.address: 20 Ghim Moh Road #01-34 Ghim Moh Market & Food Centre Singapore 270020
